name: CSLM Digital Asset Acquisition Corp III, Ltd
summary: PART I Introduction CSLM Digital Asset Acquisition Corp III, Ltd (we, us, our and the Company) is a blank check company incorporated in the Cayman Islands as an exempted company on July26, 2024 for the purpose of effecting a merger, amalgamation, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses, which we refer to throughout this Annual Report as our initial business combination.
